pfaa-lead.description: Aussie Team Lead — orchestrates 10 specialized agents

pfaa-validator.description: Aussie Validator — read-only QA and validation

aussie-planner.description: Aussie Planner — decomposes goals into ordered plans

aussie-security.description: Aussie Security — OWASP Top 10 vulnerability audits

aussie-researcher.description: Aussie Researcher — deep research and synthesis

aussie-architect.description: Aussie Architect — system design and ADRs

aussie-docs.description: Aussie Docs — keep documentation in sync

pfaa-team.description: Spawn the full 10-agent Aussie team (remix or basic mode)

aussie-run.description: Execute a goal with the Aussie Agents engine

aussie-exec.description: Python sandbox, tool execution, scatter, pipeline

aussie-memory.description: JMEM memory — stats, recall, learn, consolidate

aussie-tools.description: List tools, search tools, status, benchmarks

aussie-warmup.description: Profile all tools to populate memory baselines

aussie-evolve.description: Continuous learning — instincts, memory cleanup, skill evolution

aussie-loop.description: Automated learning cycles on a schedule

aussie-learn.description: Full JMEM cognitive cycle — recall, reward, consolidate, meta-learn, emergent, extract, decay, status

aussie-status.description: Full system health — bridge, tools, memory, agents, phases

aussie-scatter.description: Parallel fan-out — spawn sub-agents per input, merge results

aussie-pipeline.description: Sequential step execution — each output feeds the next input

aussie-generate.description: Generate code from natural language, validate with tests

aussie-search.description: Search tools by name, description, phase, or capability

aussie-ask.description: Smart Q&A with JMEM memory context and codebase search

aussie-checkpoint.description: Save and resume goals via JMEM checkpoints

aussie-session.description: Save, list, and recall session states

aussie-config.description: View and manage Claude Code configuration

aussie-bench.description: Performance benchmarks — JMEM, tools, compile times

hooks.command: cd /Users/borris/Desktop/pfaa-engine/pfaa-cli && node -e "if(process.env.ECC_HOOK_PROFILE==='off'){process.exit(0)}let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const f=(JSON.parse(d).tool_input?.file_path||'');if(f.match(/\.(ts|tsx)$/)){const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1',{timeout:15000});process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'TypeScript: OK'}))}catch(e){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'TypeScript errors found — check with: npx tsc --noEmit'}))}}})"

node -e "if(process.env.ECC_HOOK_PROFILE==='off'){process.exit(0)}let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const inp=JSON.parse(d);const f=inp.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(f.match(/\.(ts|tsx)\$/)&&!f.match(/\.(test|spec)\./)){const content=inp.tool_result?.content||inp.tool_input?.new_string||inp.tool_input?.content||'';const lines=content.split('\n');const hits=lines.filter(l=>{const t=l.trim();return/console\.log/.test(t)&&!t.startsWith('//')&&!t.startsWith('*')}).length;if(hits>0){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'Warning: '+hits+' console.log statement(s) in '+f+' (not in test file)'}))}}})"

cd /Users/borris/Desktop/pfaa-engine && node -e "if(process.env.ECC_HOOK_PROFILE==='off')process.exit(0);let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const inp=JSON.parse(d);const f=inp.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(!f.endsWith('.py'))return;const fs=require('fs');const content=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');const suggestions=[];if(content.includes('import ')&&!content.includes('lazy import')){const lines=content.split('\n');const heavyMods=['numpy','pandas','torch','tensorflow','requests','httpx','sqlalchemy','flask','fastapi','django','pydantic','scipy','matplotlib','boto3','celery'];for(const l of lines){const m=l.match(/^import\s+(\w+)/);if(m&&heavyMods.includes(m[1]))suggestions.push('PEP 810: '+l.trim()+' → lazy '+l.trim())}}if(content.match(/^[A-Z_]+\s*=\s*\{/m)&&!content.includes('frozendict'))suggestions.push('PEP 814: UPPER_CASE dict could use frozendict');if(content.includes('def ')&&content.includes('TypeVar')&&!content.match(/def\s+\w+\[/))suggestions.push('PEP 695: Use def func[T]() type param syntax');if(suggestions.length>0)process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'Py3.15: '+suggestions.join('; ')}))}catch{}})"

node -e "const R='\x1b[0m';const g=s=>'\x1b[38;2;0;230;118m'+s+R;const d=s=>'\x1b[38;2;212;160;23m'+s+R;const p=s=>'\x1b[38;2;140;60;240m'+s+R;const c=s=>'\x1b[38;2;0;200;200m'+s+R;const r=s=>'\x1b[38;2;255;80;80m'+s+R;const dim=s=>'\x1b[2m'+s+R;const b='\x1b[1m';const stops=[[255,200,40],[255,120,40],[0,200,100],[0,230,118],[0,180,220],[40,160,255],[100,140,255],[0,230,118],[0,180,80]];let t='AUSSIE AGENTS';let ct='';for(let i=0;i<t.length;i++){if(t[i]===' '){ct+=' ';continue}const f=i/(t.length-1);const idx=f*(stops.length-1);const lo=Math.floor(idx);const hi=Math.min(lo+1,stops.length-1);const ff=idx-lo;const cr=Math.round(stops[lo][0]+(stops[hi][0]-stops[lo][0])*ff);const cg=Math.round(stops[lo][1]+(stops[hi][1]-stops[lo][1])*ff);const cb=Math.round(stops[lo][2]+(stops[hi][2]-stops[lo][2])*ff);ct+='\x1b[38;2;'+cr+';'+cg+';'+cb+'m'+t[i]}let ln='';for(let i=0;i<60;i++){const f=i/60;const cr=Math.round(255*(1-f));const cg=Math.round(200+30*f);const cb=Math.round(40+78*f);ln+='\x1b[38;2;'+cr+';'+cg+';'+cb+'m━'}const msg=b+ct+R+'
  '+ln+R+'
  '+d(b+'44')+' '+d('Tools')+' '+dim('│')+' '+c(b+'17')+' '+c('MCP')+' '+dim('│')+' '+p(b+'5')+p('-Layer Memory')+' '+dim('│')+' '+r(b+'6')+' '+r('Hooks')+' '+dim('│')+' '+g(b+'10')+' '+g('Agents')+'
  '+dim('Type /aussie- for slash commands');process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'
  '+msg+'
'}))"

node -e "(async()=>{try{const http=require('http');const body=JSON.stringify({jsonrpc:'2.0',id:1,method:'tools/call',params:{name:'jmem_recall',arguments:{query:'recent learnings priorities context',limit:3,min_q:0.6}}});const opts={hostname:'localhost',port:3100,path:'/mcp/tool',method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Content-Length':Buffer.byteLength(body)},timeout:4000};const res=await new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const req=http.request(opts,r=>{let d='';r.on('data',c=>d+=c);r.on('end',()=>resolve(d))});req.on('error',reject);req.on('timeout',()=>{req.destroy();reject(new Error('timeout'))});req.write(body);req.end()});const parsed=JSON.parse(res);const result=parsed.result||parsed;const content=result.content||result.result?.content||[];const memories=Array.isArray(content)?content.filter(c=>c.type==='text').map(c=>c.text).join('\n'):typeof content==='string'?content:JSON.stringify(content);if(memories&&memories.trim()){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'JMEM Context:\n'+memories.slice(0,1500)}))}else{process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'JMEM: no recent memories found'}))}}catch(e){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'JMEM auto-recall unavailable ('+e.message+')'}))}})()"

node -e "if(process.env.ECC_HOOK_PROFILE==='off'){process.exit(0)}let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const inp=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=inp.tool_input?.command||'';const patterns=['sk-ant-','sk-proj-','ghp_','ghs_','gho_','AKIA','AIza','xoxb-','xoxp-','pat_','password=','secret=','api_key=','apikey=','token=','mongodb://','postgres://','mysql://'];const found=patterns.find(p=>cmd.toLowerCase().includes(p.toLowerCase()));if(found){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'Secret detected in command: '+found}))}})"

cd /Users/borris/Desktop/pfaa-engine && node -e "const R='\x1b[0m';const g='\x1b[38;2;0;230;118m';const d='\x1b[38;2;212;160;23m';const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');let newSkills=0,newAgents=0,pyFeatures=[];try{const skills=fs.readdirSync('.claude/skills').filter(d=>fs.statSync(path.join('.claude/skills',d)).isDirectory());const agents=fs.readdirSync('.claude/agents').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.md'));const settings=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.claude/settings.json','utf8'));const regSkills=Object.keys(settings.skills||{}).length;const regAgents=Object.keys(settings.agents||{}).length;if(skills.length>regSkills)newSkills=skills.length-regSkills;if(agents.length>regAgents)newAgents=agents.length-regAgents;const pyFiles=require('child_process').execSync('find . -name \"*.py\" -newer .claude/settings.json -not -path \"*/node_modules/*\" -not -path \"*/__pycache__/*\" 2>/dev/null||true',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim().split('\n').filter(Boolean);for(const f of pyFiles.slice(0,10)){try{const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(c.includes('lazy import'))pyFeatures.push('lazy_import');if(c.includes('frozendict'))pyFeatures.push('frozendict');if(c.includes('match ')&&c.includes('case '))pyFeatures.push('match_case');if(c.includes('TaskGroup'))pyFeatures.push('taskgroup');if(c.includes('type ')&&c.includes(' = ')&&!c.includes('typing'))pyFeatures.push('pep695')}catch{}}}catch{}const uniq=[...new Set(pyFeatures)];let msg=g+'✓'+R+' Aussie Agents '+d+'ready'+R;if(newSkills>0)msg+='  '+g+'+'+newSkills+' unregistered skill(s)'+R;if(newAgents>0)msg+='  '+g+'+'+newAgents+' unregistered agent(s)'+R;if(uniq.length>0)msg+='  '+d+'Py3.15: '+uniq.join(', ')+R;process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:msg}))"

node -e "(async()=>{try{let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',async()=>{try{const inp=d.trim()?JSON.parse(d):{};const summary=inp.stop_reason||inp.summary||'Session ended';const ts=new Date().toISOString();const content='['+ts+'] Session episode: '+String(summary).slice(0,500);const http=require('http');const body=JSON.stringify({jsonrpc:'2.0',id:1,method:'tools/call',params:{name:'jmem_remember',arguments:{content:content,level:1,tags:['auto-episode','session']}}});const opts={hostname:'localhost',port:3100,path:'/mcp/tool',method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Content-Length':Buffer.byteLength(body)},timeout:4000};const res=await new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const req=http.request(opts,r=>{let rd='';r.on('data',c=>rd+=c);r.on('end',()=>resolve(rd))});req.on('error',reject);req.on('timeout',()=>{req.destroy();reject(new Error('timeout'))});req.write(body);req.end()});process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'JMEM: episode stored'}))}catch(e){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'JMEM auto-store skipped ('+e.message+')'}))}});process.stdin.resume()}catch(e){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'JMEM auto-store unavailable ('+e.message+')'}))}})()"

node -e "if(process.env.ECC_HOOK_PROFILE==='off'){process.exit(0)}let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const inp=JSON.parse(d);const fs=require('fs');const os=require('os');const path=require('path');const dir=path.join(os.homedir(),'.pfaa');fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true});const state={timestamp:new Date().toISOString(),trigger:inp.trigger||'unknown',conversationId:inp.conversation_id||null,tokenCount:inp.token_count||null,messageCount:inp.message_count||null};fs.writeFileSync(path.join(dir,'pre-compact-state.json'),JSON.stringify(state,null,2)+'\n');process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'Pre-compact state saved'}))}catch(e){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'Pre-compact save failed: '+e.message}))}})"

node -e "if(process.env.ECC_HOOK_PROFILE==='off'){process.exit(0)}let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const inp=JSON.parse(d);const fs=require('fs');const os=require('os');const path=require('path');const dir=path.join(os.homedir(),'.pfaa');fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true});const entry={timestamp:new Date().toISOString(),trigger:inp.trigger||'unknown',summary:inp.summary||inp.compact_summary||'',conversationId:inp.conversation_id||null,tokensBeforeCompact:inp.tokens_before||null,tokensAfterCompact:inp.tokens_after||null};fs.appendFileSync(path.join(dir,'compaction-log.jsonl'),JSON.stringify(entry)+'\n');process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'Compaction summary logged to ~/.pfaa/compaction-log.jsonl'}))}catch(e){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'Compaction log failed: '+e.message}))}})"

statusLine.command: node -e "const R='\x1b[0m';const g=s=>'\x1b[38;2;0;230;118m'+s+R;const d=s=>'\x1b[38;2;212;160;23m'+s+R;const c=s=>'\x1b[38;2;0;200;200m'+s+R;const dim=s=>'\x1b[2m'+s+R;process.stdout.write(d('◆ Aussie')+' '+dim('│')+' '+g('44 tools')+' '+dim('│')+' '+c('JMEM 5L')+' '+dim('│')+' '+d('Q-learn'))"
